Index

All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

addItem(Item) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Appends an item to the character's active inventory array.
assignColor() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
Evaluates the active character symbol signature to supply a matching ANSI text formatting escape color code for terminal output rendering.
assignFloors(Floor[]) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
Assigns a series of floor structures matching a specific map index catalogue.
assignProperties() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
Overrides state definitions to assign specialized parameters like randomized currency scaling or default consumable items based on the active symbol signature.
assignProperties() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
Configures the path passability, modification criteria, and default floor hazard damage metrics by resolving structural parameters mapped to individual entity symbols.
attack - Variable in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
The attack power used to deal damage to opponents.

B

buyItem(Item) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Facilitates purchasing an item asset if fiscal gold limits allow.

C

Character_Classes - package Character_Classes
 
charDeath() - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
Checks if the character's health has reached 0 or less.
collect(DestructibleTile, Floor) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Extracts items or currency value arrays directly out of destructible tile types, updating internal inventory and purging map structures afterwards.
completeFloor(PlayableChar) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
Checks if the user-controlled character stands directly on top of the escape Exit structure, qualifying them to successfully finish exploration on this map level layer.
ConsumableItem - Class in Item_Classes
Represents a restorative item type that can be consumed by a player character.
ConsumableItem(String, float) - Constructor for class Item_Classes.ConsumableItem
Constructs a consumable item with a name and a restoration value, defaulting its monetary price handling to the parent class baseline.
ConsumableItem(String, int, float) - Constructor for class Item_Classes.ConsumableItem
Constructs a consumable item with a name, store purchase price, and a restorative health value.

D

damage - Variable in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
The value of environmental hazard damage dealt to a character upon entering.
dealDmg(GameCharacter) - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
Deals damage to a target enemy based on this character's attack power.
destroyTile(Tile) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
Replaces a specific block node with a regular, passable floor layout tile upon breakdown.
destructible - Variable in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
Flag identifying whether this map component can be broken down or collected.
DestructibleTile - Class in Dungeon_Classes
Represents a tile within the dungeon layout that can be broken or collected.
DestructibleTile(int, int, char, int, Item, boolean) - Constructor for class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
Constructs a destructible tile with direct assignments for drops and attributes.
DestructibleTile(Tile) - Constructor for class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
Constructs a destructible tile copy using attributes from an existing parent Tile instance.
detectPlayer(Tile[][], PlayableChar) - Method in class Character_Classes.EnemyChar
Calculates whether the player character is within the enemy's detection range using Manhattan distance calculation.
dialogue - Variable in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
The dialogue spoken by the character during world interactions.
dig(Tile, Floor) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Executes wall destruction processing against blocked target map coordinates.
discardItem(int) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Discards an item asset out of the active list using an explicit collection index.
displayDungeonMenu(Dungeon, int, PlayableChar) - Static method in class Game
Refreshes display lines tracking operational statistics, mapping metadata indexes, and delegates control to paint structural tiles.
displayGameMenu(PlayableChar, Dungeon) - Static method in class Game
Loops choices allowing the character to transition into physical environments, check collected storage structures, or yield activities.
displayInventory(PlayableChar) - Static method in class Game
Pauses procedural states to write out tabular listings capturing metadata naming parameters for all held item entities currently tracked inside storage.
displayMainMenu() - Static method in class Game
Loops a terminal presentation displaying standard introduction sequences, forwarding triggers to configure game models, evaluate status trackers, or terminate.
displayMap(PlayableChar) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
Compiles and outputs colorized display strings to print the visual map grid out, handling priority layer overlays for the player character and active enemy status transformations.
displayStats(PlayableChar) - Static method in class Game
Outputs text metrics formatting numerical properties like health status limits, gold storage indexes, and calculates holding item structural frequencies.
displayStatus() - Static method in class Game
Renders a placeholder block notification layout alerting that attribute inspections are still undergoing engineering developments.
dropGold(Floor) - Method in class Character_Classes.EnemyChar
Spawns a gold treasure tile at the enemy's current grid position upon defeat.
dropTreasure() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
Randomizes the treasure tile's content state, transforming its layout representation into either a raw item drop ('I') or a gold drop ('g').
Dungeon - Class in Dungeon_Classes
Represents a multi-floor dungeon layout within the game world.
Dungeon(String, int, int, Floor[], NPChar) - Constructor for class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
Constructs a dungeon environment with predefined floors, resetting the current floor tracking index to its baseline starting stage.
Dungeon_Classes - package Dungeon_Classes
 

E

EnemyChar - Class in Character_Classes
Represents a hostile NPC entity within the dungeon grid.
EnemyChar(String, float, float, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class Character_Classes.EnemyChar
Constructs an enemy character with defined combat stats, drop values, and grid position.

F

findCharTile(Tile[][]) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Scans the 2D layout grid structure looking for explicitly matching unique character keys to accurately synchronize tracking coordinates during initialization steps.
findEnemy(int, int) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
Iterates across tracking lists to find if a hostile enemy occupies the specified coordinate values.
Floor - Class in Dungeon_Classes
Represents a single layer or floor layout within the dungeon.
Floor(int) - Constructor for class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
Constructs a floor tracking environment, sets standard boundaries, and populates structural elements via dynamic tile generations.

G

Game - Class in Unnamed Package
Serves as the main orchestrator for "Yohane The Parhelion! The Siren in the Mirror World!".
GameCharacter - Class in Character_Classes
Represents an active character entity in the Mirror World of Numazu.
GameCharacter(String, float, float, int, int) - Constructor for class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
Constructs a character at a specified grid position with no dialogue.
GameCharacter(String, float, float, String) - Constructor for class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
Constructs a character with base stats, dialogue, and sets position to (0,0).
GameCharacter(String, String) - Constructor for class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
Constructs a non-combatant character (e.g., Shopkeeper) with dialogue at (0,0).
gameOver(PlayableChar) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
Monitors the user's survival state.
generateFloor() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
Parses the flat document matrix file stream to initialize structural symbols, allocating destructible elements and forwarding enemy spawn definitions seamlessly.

getItem() - Method in class Character_Classes.NPChar
 
getItemDrop() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
Retrieves the item payload dropped upon destruction.

getMember() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
Retrieves the associated member.
getName() - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
 
getName() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
Retrieves the name string representation of the dungeon.
getName() - Method in class Item_Classes.Item
Retrieves the name identification string of the item.
getNumFloors() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
Retrieves the total capacity boundary count of floors.
getPrice() - Method in class Item_Classes.Item
Retrieves the associated monetary gold price of the item.
getRowLen() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
 
getSaved() - Method in class Character_Classes.NPChar
 
getSymbol() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile

getTreasure() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
Checks if the tile contains treasure contents.

H

heal(float) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Applies restorative values to the active health variable pool without surpassing the defined maximum capability limit.
health - Variable in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
The current hitpoints (HP).

I

incrementCurFloor() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
Advances the tracking index for the player's active floor map level, capped at the defined upper bound number of maximum floors.
incrementTurn() - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Increments the total running turn engine index step count by one.
isCompleted(PlayableChar) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
Evaluates dungeon completion by checking the termination status of the final floor within the array stack.
isDestructible() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
Checks if the node can be broken or extracted.
isPassable() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
Checks if characters can move across this space.
isSaved(boolean) - Method in class Character_Classes.NPChar
 
Item - Class in Item_Classes
Represents the base blueprint for all inventory items within the game.
Item(String) - Constructor for class Item_Classes.Item
Constructs a baseline item with a name, defaulting its currency price tracking to zero.
Item(String, int) - Constructor for class Item_Classes.Item
Constructs an item setting up both its specific name designation and default store price.
Item_Classes - package Item_Classes
 

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Game
Entry programmatic hook establishing execution boundaries and forwarding flow controls straight into home menu layouts.
move(char, Floor) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Implements step direction handling ('w','a','s','d'), combat conflict discovery, hazard step environmental damage logging, and destructible path routing interactions.
move(int, Floor) - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
Moves the character to the next tile if valid.
move(Floor, PlayableChar) - Method in class Character_Classes.EnemyChar
Manages the enemy's turn execution.

N

name - Variable in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
The name of the character or entity.
name - Variable in class Item_Classes.Item
The descriptive name identifying the item.
nextItem() - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Iterates forward through the inventory layout to equip the next item node.
nextTile(int, Floor) - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
Calculates the adjacent tile coordinate based on an input direction.
NPChar - Class in Character_Classes
Represents a non-playable character (NPC) in the game world.
NPChar(String, String, Item) - Constructor for class Character_Classes.NPChar
Constructs an NPC with a specific name, dialogue text, and a reward item.

O

openTreasure(DestructibleTile) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Unlocks a treasure tile to distribute environmental asset drops.

P

passable - Variable in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
Flag identifying whether an entity can freely step onto this coordinate node.
PlayableChar - Class in Character_Classes
Represents a user-controlled character within the game.
PlayableChar(String, float, float, String) - Constructor for class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Constructs a playable character with defined statistics and resets status variables to their starting configurations.
prevItem() - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Iterates backward through the inventory layout to equip the previous item node.
price - Variable in class Item_Classes.Item
The basic gold value or purchase cost assigned to the item.

R

runDungeon(PlayableChar, Dungeon) - Static method in class Game
Manages step sequences, user input updates, turn increments, enemy actions, and victory state verifications inside an active floor scenario.

startGame() - Static method in class Game
Allocates memory for user references, maps sequence structural boundaries, and sets up the test exploration loop scenario.
symbol - Variable in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
The single character indicator tracking the structural identity layout.

T

takeDmg(float) - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
Deducts health from this character when taking damage from combat or traps.
takeDmg(GameCharacter) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Overrides standard damage reception to apply defensive subtraction and logging tracking enemy names if the strike results in a character defeat.
Tile - Class in Dungeon_Classes
Represents a fundamental structural unit or coordinate node within the dungeon grid map.
Tile(int, int, char) - Constructor for class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
Constructs a tile element setting up specific grid values, map representation characters, and initializes its movement property configurations.
Tile(Tile) - Constructor for class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
Constructs a new tile by copying attributes and values out of an existing reference node.

U

use(PlayableChar) - Method in class Item_Classes.ConsumableItem
Applies the item's curative property to the targeted player character.
use(PlayableChar) - Method in class Item_Classes.Item
Triggers the inherent game mechanic behavior tied to item consumption or equipment.
useItem() - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
Triggers the active function of the selected item, handles its depletion removal, re-indexes standard item assignments, and steps the engine turn metrics.

V

validateMove(Tile) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
Validates if a chosen step destination falls safely inside the boundaries of the map grid and checks whether the physical layout features allow structural passability.

X

x - Variable in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
The X and Y coordinates mapping the position on the 2D dungeon grid.
x - Variable in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
The horizontal grid row index of the tile.

Y

y - Variable in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
The X and Y coordinates mapping the position on the 2D dungeon grid.
y - Variable in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
The vertical grid column index of the tile.
